enforced: ktlint config lives in .editorconfig under [*.{kt,kts}] as ktlint_* properties (ktlint >=0.49 dropped the standalone .ktlint.yml file)
ktlint_code_style = ktlint_official plus ktlint_standard_* toggles (no-wildcard-imports, max-line-length, no-unused-imports, trailing-comma) are machine-enforced formatting
detekt.yml complexity thresholds (ComplexMethod, LongMethod, LongParameterList, NestedBlockDepth, TooManyFunctions) are machine-enforced
detekt exceptions rules (TooGenericExceptionCaught, SwallowedException) and potential-bugs (UnsafeCallOnNullableType) catch correctness bugs
detekt style rules (ForbiddenComment, MagicNumber, MaxLineLength, WildcardImport) are machine-enforced
note: detekt.yml targets the detekt 1.23.x stable config schema; detekt 2.0 changes the Gradle plugin id but keeps this config shape.
